title: thelypteris metcalfei
intro: Thelypteris metcalfei, also known as the Metcalfe's maiden fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Thelypteris metcalfei include relief from arthritis, fever, and digestive problems, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it can also be dried and used as a powder for various applications.
